name: frogdb-debug-assets
description: Vendored JS/CSS assets for the FrogDB debug web UI

scripts.vendor: mkdir -p assets/js assets/css && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js assets/js/htmx.min.js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js assets/js/alpine.min.js && cp node_modules/uplot/dist/uPlot.iife.min.js assets/js/uplot.min.js && cp node_modules/uplot/dist/uPlot.min.css assets/css/uPlot.min.css && cp node_modules/chota/dist/chota.min.css assets/css/chota.min.css
